description_long: This is a modern, stylized assault rifle with a distinctive black, gray, and blue color scheme. The rifle features a fixed stock with a textured buttplate, a prominent pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine. The receiver and handguard are adorned with angular, geometric patterns in light gray and blue, giving it a contemporary, tactical appearance. The barrel is standard length and fitted with a simple front sight post, while the rear sight is integrated into the receiver. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, typical of modern military rifles. The design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern assault rifle with a black, gray, and blue geometric design, fixed stock, and detachable box magazine. Features a standard barrel, iron sights, and a tactical, durable build.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the fixed stock, pistol grip, magazine, and detailed geometric patterns.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the stock and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
